ModMetaData.name: Elldar's Patches Compilation
ModMetaData.author: Elldar
ModMetaData.description:
Various Patches for HSK.
Mostly Architect Sense support and research changes, but some mods have been fully patched. Some patches are still WIP, more will come.
Some of the mods I've patched didn't had their version tag updated, but they still work. To avoid wrong version warning I suggest using Mlie's No Version Warning mod.
- Includes Bodyrestoration cycle from Nelson's old 1.3 patches. - Includes SmootherTerraforming by Pro_Triforcer, now fixed to work with Vile's Biome mods. - Includes presets for Show Me Your Hands for many modded weapons.
